item.buildtools.selection_staff.tooltip: Right-click block: set first point. Sneak right-click block: set second point. Right-click air: cycle shape.
item.buildtools.builder_wand.tooltip: Put the build block in offhand. Right-click selected area to build. Sneak/right-click air: cycle fill or replace.
item.buildtools.blueprint_trowel.tooltip: Right-click block: copy current selection. Sneak right-click block: paste at the clicked face.
item.buildtools.undo_token.tooltip: Right-click to undo your most recent BuildTools operation.
buildtools.error.dimension_mismatch: That selection belongs to another dimension.
buildtools.error.offhand_block: Put the block to place in your offhand.
buildtools.error.unsupported_block: That block cannot be placed by BuildTools.
buildtools.error.copy_unsupported: Blueprints cannot copy fluids or block entities in v1.
buildtools.error.no_undo: There is no BuildTools operation to undo.
buildtools.error.out_of_world: Selection includes blocks outside the world.
buildtools.error.protected_state: BuildTools skips fluids and block entities in v1.
buildtools.configuration.title: BuildTools Configs
